'''âzh-w-th''' ('''kazhawath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoogle|yoogle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoogle|yoogle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| kazhawath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhawath|thizhawath]] || [[word:jizhawath|jizhawath]] || [[word:shizhawath|shizhawath]] || [[word:kizhawath|kizhawath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhawath|thuthuzhawath]] || [[word:jujuzhawath|jujuzhawath]] || [[word:shushuzhawath|shushuzhawath]] || [[word:kukuzhawath|kukuzhawath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhawath|thuzhawath]] || [[word:juzhawath|juzhawath]] || [[word:shuzhawath|shuzhawath]] || [[word:kuzhawath|kuzhawath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhawath|thuzhawath]] || [[word:juzhawath|juzhawath]] || [[word:shuzhawath|shuzhawath]] || [[word:kuzhawath|kuzhawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhawath|thezhawath]] || [[word:jezhawath|jezhawath]] || [[word:shezhawath|shezhawath]] || [[word:kezhawath|kezhawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhawath|thothozhawath]] || [[word:jojozhawath|jojozhawath]] || [[word:shoshozhawath|shoshozhawath]] || [[word:kokozhawath|kokozhawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhawath|thozhawath]] || [[word:jozhawath|jozhawath]] || [[word:shozhawath|shozhawath]] || [[word:kozhawath|kozhawath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhawath|thozhawath]] || [[word:jozhawath|jozhawath]] || [[word:shozhawath|shozhawath]] || [[word:kozhawath|kozhawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhawath|thĂŠzhawath]] || [[word:jĂŠzhawath|jĂŠzhawath]] || [[word:shĂŠzhawath|shĂŠzhawath]] || [[word:kĂŠzhawath|kĂŠzhawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhawath|thathazhawath]] || [[word:jajazhawath|jajazhawath]] || [[word:shashazhawath|shashazhawath]] || [[word:kakazhawath|kakazhawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhawath|thazhawath]] || [[word:jazhawath|jazhawath]] || [[word:shazhawath|shazhawath]] || [[word:kazhawath|kazhawath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhawath|thazhawath]] || [[word:jazhawath|jazhawath]] || [[word:shazhawath|shazhawath]] || [[word:kazhawath|kazhawath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhawath|shazhawath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhawath|goshazhawath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhawath|gokishazhawath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhawathnĂŒ|shazhawathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawathnknĂŒ|goshazhawathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawathnĂŒ|gokishazhawathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhawathshĂ«|shazhawathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkshĂ«|goshazhawathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhawathshĂ«|gokishazhawathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawathro|shazhawathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkro|goshazhawathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawathro|gokishazhawathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawathmu|shazhawathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkmu|goshazhawathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawathmu|gokishazhawathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhawathsher|shazhawathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhawathnksher|goshazhawathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhawathsher|gokishazhawathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhawathng|shazhawathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkng|goshazhawathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhawathng|gokishazhawathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhawathya|shazhawathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkya|goshazhawathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhawathya|gokishazhawathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhawathyam|shazhawathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkyam|goshazhawathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhawathyam|gokishazhawathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhawathnĂŒshĂ«|shazhawathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhawathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhawathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhawathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhawathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawathnĂŒro|shazhawathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawathnknĂŒro|goshazhawathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawathnĂŒro|gokishazhawathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawathnĂŒmu|shazhawathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawathnknĂŒmu|goshazhawathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawathnĂŒmu|gokishazhawathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhawathshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhawathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhawathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhawathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawathshĂ«ro|shazhawathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkshĂ«ro|goshazhawathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawathshĂ«ro|gokishazhawathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawathshĂ«mu|shazhawathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkshĂ«mu|goshazhawathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawathshĂ«mu|gokishazhawathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhawathronĂŒ|shazhawathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkronĂŒ|goshazhawathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawathronĂŒ|gokishazhawathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhawathroshĂ«|shazhawathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkroshĂ«|goshazhawathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhawathroshĂ«|gokishazhawathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhawathromu|shazhawathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkromu|goshazhawathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhawathromu|gokishazhawathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhawathmunĂŒ|shazhawathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkmunĂŒ|goshazhawathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhawathmunĂŒ|gokishazhawathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhawathmushĂ«|shazhawathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkmushĂ«|goshazhawathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhawathmushĂ«|gokishazhawathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhawathmuro|shazhawathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhawathnkmuro|goshazhawathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhawathmuro|gokishazhawathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
